scripts.generate-env: pnpm -C apps/shell run generate-env && pnpm -C apps/gallery run generate-env && pnpm -C apps/analytics run generate-env
scripts.deploy-everything: pnpm -C apps/shell run deploy:infra && pnpm run cognito-service:deploy && pnpm run photos-service:deploy && pnpm run historic-likes-service:deploy && pnpm run realtime-likes-service:deploy && pnpm run shell:deploy && pnpm run gallery:deploy && pnpm run analytics:deploy
scripts.destroy-everything: pnpm run shell:destroy && pnpm run realtime-likes-service:destroy && pnpm run historic-likes-service:destroy && pnpm run photos-service:destroy && pnpm run cognito-service:destroy
scripts.data:reset: pnpm -C services/photos-service run data:reset && pnpm -C services/historic-likes-service run data:reset && pnpm -C services/cognito-service run data:reset
